# Affordable hire and high-quality cars

We are committed to making your car and van hire experience easy and hassle-free. With free cancellation, speedy collection and a 24-hour service, we are the car hire company of choice in Kent.

[Car and Van Hire](https://www.albcarrent.co.uk/our-services)

## Car rental

We offer a wide range of cars for hire, from small hatchbacks to larger executive saloons. Whether you're hiring for a long journey or just to get around the local area, we'll have the car you need.

[Car Rental](https://www.albcarrent.co.uk/our-services)

## Van rental

[Van Rental](https://www.albcarrent.co.uk/our-services)

Our fleet of vans offer something for home movers, DIYers or large group trips. Whether you're organising a pensioner's day out or a school field trip, need to move furniture or anything else, we'll have the van for you.
